requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence for Bulgaria PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据（保加利亚光伏逆变器）
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據（保加利亞光伏逆變器）

summary.en: For Bulgaria solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family. BDS is the national standards body adopting EN/IEC norms; EWRC oversees the energy sector; and ESO controls the practical grid-connection interface. Project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory for all PV inverters placed on the Bulgarian market. Bulgarian-language instructions and labelling may be required under national market-surveillance and consumer-protection rules.
summary.zh: 对于保加利亚太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件应围绕准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备。BDS是采用EN/IEC规范的国家标准机构，EWRC监管能源行业，ESO控制实际并网接口。项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。依据低电压指令2014/35/EU，在保加利亚市场销售的所有光伏逆变器均须取得CE标志。国家市场监管及消费者保护规则可能要求提供保加利亚语说明书和标识。
summary.zht: 對於保加利亞太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件應圍繞準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備。BDS是採用EN/IEC規範的國家標準機構，EWRC監管能源行業，ESO控制實際併網介面。項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU，在保加利亞市場銷售的所有光伏逆變器均須取得CE標誌。國家市場監管及消費者保護規則可能要求提供保加利亞語說明書和標識。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
LVD 2014/35/EU (mandatory CE marking for Bulgaria as EU member state)
BDS standards adoption and conformity expectations where applicable
EWRC and ESO project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Bulgarian projects. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Bulgarian project files must reflect 230/400 V, 50 Hz installation conditions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为保加利亚项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而保加利亚项目文件必须反映230/400 V、50 Hz安装条件。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為保加利亞項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而保加利亞項目文件必須反映230/400 V、50 Hz安裝條件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Bulgaria IEC safety expectations or LVD requirements. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family, confirm that labels and manuals match the Bulgarian configuration at 230/400 V 50 Hz, document protection coordination and earthing, and ensure CE marking is obtained with an EU Declaration of Conformity. Bulgarian-language instructions may be required under national market-surveillance rules. An EU Authorised Representative must be appointed if no EU importer is established.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足保加利亚IEC安全要求或低电压指令要求。出口商应提供所供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告，确认标签和手册匹配230/400 V、50 Hz保加利亚配置，记录保护配合和接地，并取得CE标志和欧盟符合性声明。国家市场监管规则可能要求提供保加利亚语说明书。若无欧盟进口商，须指定欧盟授权代表。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足保加利亞IEC安全要求或低電壓指令要求。出口商應提供所供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告，確認標籤和手冊匹配230/400 V、50 Hz保加利亞配置，記錄保護配合和接地，並取得CE標誌和歐盟符合性聲明。國家市場監管規則可能要求提供保加利亞語說明書。若無歐盟進口商，須指定歐盟授權代表。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is required for all PV inverters placed on the Bulgarian market; IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence is mandatory in practice where BDS, EWRC, ESO, EPC, lender, or project-owner documentation requires it
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Bulgaria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Bulgaria PV projects. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model, obtain CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU, align labels and manuals to Bulgaria's 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration, and confirm current BDS, EWRC, ESO, and project-owner safety requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 保加利亚光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。请为准确型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，依据低电压指令2014/35/EU取得CE标志，使标签和手册匹配保加利亚230/400 V、50 Hz配置，并在出货前确认现行BDS、EWRC、ESO及项目业主安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 保加利亞光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。請為準確型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU取得CE標誌，使標籤和手冊匹配保加利亞230/400 V、50 Hz配置，並在出貨前確認現行BDS、EWRC、ESO及項目業主安全要求。
